title: rosa canina var. obtusifolia
intro: Rosa canina var. obtusifolia, a variant of the wild rose, is a flowering shrub native to the Mediterranean region. The plant's medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. Rosa canina var. obtusifolia has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory issues, and its health benefits also include reducing stress and improving overall well-being. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used topically in creams and salves.
